title: baccharoides longepedunculata var. manikensis
intro: Baccharoides longepedunculata var. manikensis, also known as Manikari, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits associated with Baccharoides longepedunculata var. manikensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Baccharoides longepedunculata var. manikensis is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin infections and respiratory problems.
